description: Example: run implementer arms against a local model (Ollama + aider) instead of Claude or Codex. Slower but $0 per run. Useful for experiments, offline work, or cost-sensitive prototyping. Advanced — requires Ollama and aider installed. Copy this to ~/.beads/formulas/ and tweak to your setup.

plan.description: Path to a plan file. Strongly recommended — local models need very tight specs.

base_branch.description: Branch to merge integration/{team} back into

ollama_model.description: Ollama model tag for implementation. Recommend qwen2.5-coder:32b or larger for non-trivial work.

steps.title: [{{team}}] explore + decompose: {{feature}}
steps.description: Map the codebase for {{feature}}. Decompose into SMALL, tightly-specified arms — local models need ~5-file bites max. Write a detailed plan file per arm at /tmp/{{team}}-{arm}-plan.md (full function signatures, exact field names, error handling). Bond one implement-arm per arm with plan_file set. Model: haiku.

steps.title: [{{team}}] judge: verify all implementations
steps.description: Judge all implementer arms. Local models often drift from spec — be stricter on plan fidelity than you would for Claude/Codex arms. VERDICT: FAIL often means the plan was too vague; consider rewriting plan_file and re-dispatching rather than just reopening. Max 3 attempts. Model: sonnet.

steps.title: [{{team}}] code-review: integration/{{team}} branch
steps.description: Run code review on integration/{{team}} branch. Pay extra attention to subtle bugs — local models produce code that looks right but often has off-by-ones or wrong field names. Report P1/P2.

steps.title: [{{team}}] integrate: merge arms, merge to base branch, clean up
steps.description: Standard integration. Expect to fix more P1s than usual — budget for 1-2 rounds of manual fixes before the branch is shippable.
